articles.title: Dashboard Overview
articles.content:
The dashboard provides a comprehensive view of your delivery operations. Key features include:

- **Real-time Analytics**: Monitor revenue trends, order volume, and active plasa statistics.
- **Order Tracking**: Follow every order from creation to delivery confirmation.
- **Financial Insights**: Real-time balance tracking for both company and shopper wallets.
- **Service Monitoring**: Keep an eye on pending alerts and system performance metrics.

articles.title: First Steps
articles.content:
1. **Log in to your account**: Use your system credentials to access the secure dashboard.
2. **Explore Navigation**: Use the sidebar to access Management, POS, and Configuration tools.
3. **Set Up Notifications**: Ensure you stay informed about pending orders and ticket updates.
4. **Review Documentation**: Check the 'Marketing & Growth' section to understand how to leverage promotions and referrals.

articles.title: User Roles & Levels
articles.content:
The system uses a hierarchical Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system:

- **Global Admin**: Full access to all system modules, including privilege management and financial overrides.
- **System Admin**: Broad operational access, focused on system-wide configurations.
- **Project Admin**: Management access for specific project components.
- **Support Staff**: Access limited to customer tickets, refunds, and order monitoring.

articles.title: Managing User Privileges
articles.content:
Privileges are managed in the 'Project Users' section:

1. **Module Access**: Toggle visibility and entry access for entire sections (e.g., Wallet, Inventory).
2. **Action Privileges**: Specific permissions for Add, Edit, or Delete actions within a module.
3. **Two-Factor Auth**: Admins can monitor and enforce 2FA for sensitive accounts.

articles.content:
The Global Admin has absolute access to every module and action in the system.

articles.title: Cashier Privileges
Manual Product Entry
articles.content:
Administrators and shop owners can add products manually through the 'Add New Product' dialog:

1. **Select Product Name**: Choose an existing name from the global catalog or create a new one.
2. **Define Inventory Settings**: Set the base price, final price (what customers pay), and current quantity.
3. **Stock Control**: Specify measurement units (e.g., kg, pieces) and the reorder point for low-stock alerts.
4. **Status**: Toggle 'Is Active' to control visibility on the marketplace.

articles.title: Bulk Import via CSV
articles.content:
To manage large inventories, use the Import feature in the Products section:

- **CSV Format**: Upload a structured file containing Product Name, Barcode, SKU, and Description.
- **Duplicate Handling**: The system automatically detects existing barcodes to prevent duplicate entries.
- **Catalog Synchronization**: Imported items become part of the 'Global Product Names' catalog, making them available for all shops to link to.
- **Progress Tracking**: View a real-time progress bar during the import process to monitor success and skip rates.

articles.title: Global Catalog vs. Shop Inventory
articles.content:
Our system separates the 'What' from the 'Where':

- **Product Names (Catalog)**: A global database of items (labels, barcodes, images) that are shop-independent.
- **Products (Inventory)**: Specific instances of catalog items assigned to a shop with unique prices and stock levels.
- **Relationship**: One 'Product Name' can be linked to multiple 'Products' in different shops, ensuring consistent branding across the platform.

articles.title: Referral System & Logic
articles.content:
The referral system is designed to incentivize user growth through performance-based commissions:

- **Relationship**: Every referral record is linked to a unique user and their generated voucher code.
- **Order Tracking**: When a customer uses a referral code at checkout, that order is permanently linked to the referrer.
- **Earning Trigger**: Earning calculations only begin after a referral is manually reviewed and marked as 'Active' by an administrator.
- **Case Sensitivity**: Referral codes are processed case-insensitively to ensure users never miss out on earnings due to typing errors.

articles.title: Commission & Payout Logic
articles.content:
Commissions are calculated based on the actual markup generated, not the gross sale amount:

- **The Formula**: `Referral Earnings = (SellingTotal - CostTotal) * 0.0075`.
- **Definitions**:
  - **SellingTotal**: The final price paid by the customer for all items in the order.
  - **CostTotal**: The base price paid to the shop for those items.
- **Exclusions**: System fees and delivery charges are excluded from the commission pool to protect platform margins.
- **Real-time Stats**: Referrers can see their 'Orders Count', 'Total Volume', and 'Live Earnings' directly in their dashboard.

articles.title: Promotions & Vouchers
articles.content:
Manage your marketing campaigns efficiently:

- **Voucher Generation**: Create unique codes for discounts.
- **Campaign Management**: Define start/end dates and usage limits.
- **Discount Rules**: Configure percentage or fixed-amount discounts.
- **Performance Tracking**: Monitor how effectively each promotion is driving sales.

articles.title: Order & Delivery Trends
articles.content:
Visualizing your delivery performance:

- **Orders Chart**: Displays total order volume over time, helping identify peak demand periods.
- **On-Time Trend**: Tracks the percentage of orders delivered within target timeframes (e.g., 90 minutes).
- **Overdue Monitoring**: Real-time visualization of orders exceeding delivery SLAs, requiring immediate attention.
- **Plasa Performance**: Comparison of delivery times across different regions or hubs.

articles.title: Financial & Revenue Charts
articles.content:
Monitor the financial health of the platform:

- **Revenue Overview**: Monthly and daily revenue trends with comparative indicators.
- **Refunds Analysis**: Breakdown of refund amounts, status distributions, and volume over time.
- **Transaction History**: Trend visualization of payment methods (Cash, Card, Momo) and volume.

articles.title: Creating an Order
articles.content:
To create a new order manually or via POS:

1. Select the items from the available inventory.
2. Add customer details or select existing ones.
3. Choose the payment method (Cash, Card, or Momo).
4. Confirm and print the invoice for the customer.

articles.title: Advanced Scanning Logic
articles.content:
Our system features a hardware-integrated scanning system:

- **Live Camera Feed**: Access real-time scanning using your device camera.
- **Quick Linking**: Scanned codes automatically search the Global Catalog.
- **Fallback Mode**: If camera access fails, the system provides a manual entry field with real-time suggestions.
- **Compatibility**: Supports EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC, Code 128, and standard QR codes.

articles.title: Refunds Management
articles.content:
Handle financial reversals with confidence:

- **Automated Processing**: Trigger refunds directly from the dashboard.
- **Wallet Integration**: Refunded amounts are automatically reconciled with relevant wallet balances.
- **Audit Trail**: Every refund is documented for financial reconciliation.

articles.title: Wallet Operations
articles.content:
Managing financial transactions for the entire system:

- **Company Payouts**: process withdrawals for system users.
- **Reconciliation**: Audit transaction history against order records.
- **Multi-currency**: Support for various currency formats as configured in system settings.

articles.title: Creating Support Tickets
articles.content:
1. Navigate to Support section
2. Click 'New Ticket'
3. Select issue category
4. Provide details
5. Attach relevant files
6. Submit ticket

articles.title: Tracking Issue Resolution
articles.content:
Monitor support ticket status:

- View ticket history
- Check resolution progress
- Communicate with support team
- Rate support experience
